changes_required_for_requested_stack: add a representation metadata subsystem that can compute ETag or equivalent validators and evaluate If-None-Match / If-Modified-Since before response emission
add explicit RFC 7232 and RFC 9111 policy and test coverage for validation and caching
add RFC 9530 digest field generation and verification for content and representation digests
add a dedicated HTTP Message Signatures component for RFC 9421, including covered-component selection and signature verification
if JOSE or COSE is desired, add a dedicated auth / crypto boundary rather than folding those features into the current transport-only certification boundary
extend machine-readable certification manifests, release gates, contracts, and evidence bundles if any of these RFCs are to become claimed targets

accept_encoding.notes: Accept-Encoding parsing and qvalue selection are implemented for the buffered response coding path.

content_digest.notes: No Content-Digest field implementation was found.

content_encoding.notes: gzip, deflate, and optional br are emitted when the response qualifies for coding.

cose_signing.notes: No COSE signing surface was found.

etag.notes: The name appears in HPACK/QPACK static tables, but no ETag generation or validator comparison engine was found.

http_signatures.notes: No HTTP Message Signatures implementation was found.

if_none_match.notes: The name appears in HPACK/QPACK static tables, but no If-None-Match evaluation path was found.

jose_signing.notes: No JOSE/JWS signing surface was found.

repr_digest.notes: No Repr-Digest field implementation was found.

response_304.notes: HTTP/1.1 serialization knows status 304 and suppresses the body, but no RFC 7232 conditional-request decision engine was found.

vary.notes: Vary: accept-encoding is emitted on the content-coding path.

missing_modules_or_capability_classes: HTTP cache key and cache-control / revalidation subsystem
Content-Digest / Repr-Digest field generator and verifier
HTTP Message Signatures component and policy surface

rfc7232.notes: No conditional-request validator engine was found for ETag, If-None-Match, or 304 revalidation semantics.
rfc7232.title: HTTP Conditional Requests

rfc7515.notes: No JOSE signing surface is declared or implemented by the transport server boundary.
rfc7515.title: JWS

rfc7516.notes: No JOSE encryption surface is declared or implemented by the transport server boundary.
rfc7516.title: JWE

rfc7519.notes: No JWT token model or validation surface is declared or implemented by the transport server boundary.
rfc7519.title: JWT

rfc8152.notes: No COSE signing or envelope surface was found in this checkpoint.
rfc8152.title: COSE

rfc9052.notes: No COSE bis update surface was found in this checkpoint.
rfc9052.title: COSE bis

rfc9110.notes: The current certification boundary does not claim full RFC 9110 coverage.
rfc9110.title: HTTP Semantics

rfc9111.notes: No HTTP cache or cache revalidation subsystem was found in this checkpoint.
rfc9111.title: HTTP Caching

rfc9421.notes: No HTTP Signature-Input, Signature, or signing policy subsystem was found in this checkpoint.
rfc9421.title: HTTP Message Signatures

rfc9530.notes: No Content-Digest or Repr-Digest field implementation was found in this checkpoint.
rfc9530.title: Content-Digest / Repr-Digest

notes: tigrcorn is certifiably fully RFC compliant only under its declared authoritative certification boundary
the requested stack extends beyond that declared boundary
RFC 9110 is only partially targeted here, limited to CONNECT semantics, trailer fields, and content coding
